prose.en: When transferring information between different security domains, sanitize data to minimize {param:ac-04.25_odp.01} in accordance with {param:ac-04.25_odp.02}.

choices.value: delivery of malicious content, command and control of malicious code, malicious code augmentation, and steganography-encoded data

guidance.en: Data sanitization is the process of irreversibly removing or destroying data stored on a memory device (e.g., hard drives, flash memory/solid state drives, mobile devices, CDs, and DVDs) or in hard copy form.

prose.en: when transferring information between different security domains, data is sanitized to minimize {param:ac-04.25_odp.01} in accordance with {param:ac-04.25_odp.02}.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with information flow enforcement responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms implementing information flow enforcement functions

guidelines.en: policy for sanitizing data is defined;
